brief_title: A Study to Evaluate Safety, Pharmacokinetics, and Activity of GDC-7035 as a Single Agent and in Combination in Patients With Advanced Solid Tumors
official_title: A Phase I/II Dose-Escalation and Expansion Study Evaluating the Safety, Pharmacokinetics, and Activity of GDC-7035 as a Single Agent and in Combination With Other Anti-Cancer Therapies in Patients With Advanced Solid Tumors With a KRAS G12D Mutation
brief_summary: This is a first-in-human Phase I/II, open-label, multicenter, dose-escalation and expansion study designed to evaluate the safety, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary activity of GDC-7035 as a single agent and in combination with other anti-cancer therapies in participants with advanced or metastatic solid tumors that harbor the KRAS G12D mutation.

interventions.name: Phase I Arm A
interventions.description: Dose escalation and expansion arm, with protocol-defined dose(s) of GDC-7035

interventions.name: Phase I Arm B
interventions.description: Dose escalation and expansion arm, with protocol-defined dose(s) of GDC-7035 in combination with other anti-cancer therapies

eligibility.criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Histologically documented advanced or metastatic solid tumor with KRAS G12D mutation
* Agreement to adhere to the contraception requirements described in the protocol for participants of childbearing potential and participants who produce sperm

Exclusion criteria:

* Malabsorption or other condition that would interfere with enteral absorption
* Active brain metastases
* Clinically significant cardiovascular dysfunction or liver disease

primary_outcomes.measure: Percentage of Participants with Adverse Events, with Severity Determined According to the CTCAE v5.0 Grading Scale
Percentage of Participants with Dose Limiting Toxicity
